channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pavement blocked, 21st July
item.description:
50yards north there is an actual rental bike parking in Alscot Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alscot Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found, 21st July
item.description:
A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found by Brent Council
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipped clothing and rubbish beside donation bank, 21st July
item.description:
Large amount of fly-tipped waste has been dumped on the pavement between the clothing donation bank and the commercial waste bin. The waste consists of bags of clothing, loose textiles, cardboard, plastic bags, and general rubbish, obstructing part of the footpath and creating an unsightly and unhygienic environment. Please arrange for this to be cleared as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Bridge Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tagging, 21st July
item.description:
Graffiti tagging under bridge

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of Gardening stuff, 21st July
item.description:
Bags of garden rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ranelagh Road, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are multiple abandoned cycle bikes and an abandoned motorcycle here., 21st July
item.description:
Many of the residents at Lewis Gardens are waiting on cycle parking shelter access. The existing shelters are not being maintained by SHG and are full of abandoned bikes/ motorcyc. Please instruct SHG to write to all residents when they Will clear these.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lewis Gardens, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large laughing gas canister requires appropriate disposal, 21st July
item.description:
I found a large laughing gas canister in the gutter & have placed it by the green box for appropriate disposal
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aycliffe Close, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found, 21st July
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London

item.title: Leftover barriers and cones, 21st July
item.description:
Been here since works completed looks a mess

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mosslea Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lazy bin men, 21st July
item.description:
This has been here all weekend and you just keep driving past it pull your finger out of your backside

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Linnet Close, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins already full up on day of collection, 21st July
item.description:
These two so-called recycle bins have been filled up already, only a few hours after being emptied. There is no need for these to be here, everyone in surrounding houses has wheelie bins and having these bins encourages people to drive up with all their rubbish and dump it here. Then the bins get full and people dump nearby, attracting vermin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 84-96, Scylla Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 21st July
item.description:
Constant problem with household waste being dumped by this bin. Numerous reported have been made. It is causing foxes and I am sure other vermin. Please investigate this and get it stopped.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heathfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Miss collection, 21st July
item.description:
These Bins should’ve been emptied on yesterday (Monday) Pull your finger out, lazy binmen
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Linnet Close, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging tree, 21st July
item.description:
Tree overhanging public footbath causing danger to pedestrians, been overgrown for over 6weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Byne Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Pharmacy, 21st July
item.description:
Hello. You informed me that case 9818144 has been closed. Case 9818144 is still very much open - as you can see by the attached picture, the food waste bin is still filthy, surrounded by garbage, it stinks, and is a risk to public health. Imagine having this outside your building! Thanks to Brent Council for creating a health hazard in a busy shopping and dining area, and then putting up our council tax! All to save a few bags of food waste! I'll be reporting this to the relevant environmental agencies too. I look for ward to seeing it resolved (ideally removed) ASAP.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Litter bin needs emptying

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Illegally parked cars, 21st July
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lancaster Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
